title: Implement continuous slot-fill loop in scheduler core
description: Refactor scheduler execution in src/agent_takt/scheduler/core.py so run_once() keeps filling newly available worker slots within the same call, re-evaluates readiness after completions, and exits only when nothing is running and nothing remains dispatchable.
acceptance_criteria: A freed worker slot can dispatch another ready bead within the same run_once() call.
Beads that become ready mid-cycle are reconsidered before run_once() returns.
The scheduler loop terminates only when no futures are active and no additional ready beads can be dispatched.
Existing run_once() call sites remain compatible with the updated behavior.
